untranslatable_reason: Signal requires PCA (Principal Component Analysis) on a cross-sectional universe of stocks to extract factor exposures and construct a long-short portfolio. This is a portfolio-construction algorithm requiring eigendecomposition and factor modeling across multiple securities, not a single-security technical indicator-based rule. The allowed indicators are single-stock price/volume technical indicators and cannot express: (1) PCA decomposition, (2) cross-sectional factor exposure calculations, (3) ranking and sorting of stocks by expected returns, (4) momentum assumption in factor returns, or (5) long-short portfolio construction logic. This signal belongs in a separate factor model/optimization engine, not a rule-based backtest.
translation_notes: CHAN_QT_DRY_0 is a quantitative multi-stock factor strategy that transcends single-security technical rules. It requires: (a) universe selection (S&P 600), (b) PCA on covariance/correlation matrix, (c) factor return momentum modeling, (d) expected return forecasting via factor loadings, (e) portfolio optimization and ranking. No subset of the allowed technical indicators can replicate this logic.
